Water Loss Investigation

Precision source identification for complex plumbing and intrusion failures

sendSubmit an Assignment
3,800+
Cases Completed
36 Hours
Response Time
96%
Success Rate
Nationwide
Coverage Area

Overview

Trinity Engineering's water loss investigations combine forensic engineering expertise with advanced diagnostic technology to accurately identify the source, cause, and extent of water damage. Our PE engineers specialize in complex cases involving hidden plumbing leaks, building envelope failures, and intrusion source determination for residential and commercial properties.

Request This Servicearrow_forward

Report Types Available

Source Identification Report

Focused investigation to determine the exact source and cause of water intrusion.

schedule3-5 Business Days

Comprehensive Water Loss Report

Detailed forensic analysis including source, timeline, extent, and material impact assessment.

schedule5-7 Business Days

Litigation Support Package

In-depth investigation with detailed exhibits, testing data, and expert witness preparation.

scheduleCustom Timeline

Services & Solutions

Comprehensive capabilities delivered by licensed Professional Engineers

plumbing

Plumbing System Analysis

Forensic investigation of pipe failures, water heater malfunctions, and fixture leaks.

roofing

Roof & Envelope Failure

Identification of water intrusion through roofing, walls, windows, and foundation.

thermostat

Thermal Imaging

Advanced infrared thermography to detect hidden moisture and water migration patterns.

water_drop

Moisture Mapping

Comprehensive moisture detection and mapping to determine extent of water damage.

search

Non-Destructive Testing

Utilization of borescopes, moisture meters, and acoustic testing to locate hidden sources.

science

Material Analysis

Assessment of water damage impact on building materials and structural components.

Perils Assessed

Our forensic engineers investigate a comprehensive range of failure mechanisms and causes

Our Investigation Process

A systematic approach to forensic engineering excellence

visibility
1

Initial Assessment

Comprehensive site inspection to document water damage and identify potential source areas.

biotech
2

Diagnostic Testing

Deployment of thermal cameras, moisture meters, and non-destructive testing equipment.

pin_drop
3

Source Identification

Forensic analysis to pinpoint the exact origin and cause of water intrusion.

fact_check
4

Expert Report Delivery

Comprehensive report with source determination, extent of damage, and repair recommendations.
